name: Pitcaithly Bannock (Scottish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F/Gas Mark 3.
2. Grease a baking sheet.
3. Sift the flour into a bowl.
4. Add the sugar and butter, then rub in until a dough forms.
5. Incorporate the almonds and mix in the peel evenly.
6. Form the mixture into a thick round on a lightly floured surface.
7. Prick the round all over with a fork.
8. Place on the baking sheet and bake for about 45-60 minutes.
9. Allow to cool, then serve sliced thinly and buttered.
